items.label: Site description
items.value: Cascade retrofit of lighting-layout uk-multi-entrance-classroom example. 80 m² classroom (10×8 m); 16 × LED_PANEL_600 at 4500 lm each in 4×4 grid; 3 entrance switches (SW01..SW03) per BS 7671 §559.5. Photometric-analysis verifies the classroom 300 lux target + U₀ 0.6 + UGR 19.

value._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, 4500lm, 4000K, opal diffuser. Distribution: Lambertian cos(theta) per CIBSE LG7 §6.2 typical opal panel. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py. Engineer must substitute project IES.
